title: Chytraculia punctata
taxonomy: Chytraculia punctata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the tribe Cichorieae and is native to South Africa. This classification places it within the larger plant kingdom, more specifically within the angiosperms. Chytraculia punctata is further classified as a member of the genus Chytraculia, which itself is part of the larger plant family. The classification of Chytraculia punctata provides essential information about its evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
